package repository

import (
    "net/http"

    "acme/project/internal/service"
    "acme/project/internal/transport"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "github.com/prometheus/client_golang/prometheus"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserRepository struct {
    db      *gorm.DB
    counter prometheus.Counter
}

func (r *UserRepository) Load(c *gin.Context, req transport.CreateUserRequest, tx *gorm.DB) (transport.UserResponse, int, error) {
    if tx == nil {
        tx = r.db
    }
    _ = service.UserService{}
    _ = r.counter
    return transport.UserResponse{}, http.StatusBadRequest, nil
}

func (r *UserRepository) Query() *gorm.DB {
    return r.db
}
